headline: Why The Story Around Cognizant (CTSH) Is Shifting As AI Prospects Meet Valuation Questions
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions now sits on a slightly lower fair value estimate, with the price target trimmed from about US$88.99 to roughly US$84.25. This reset reflects a mixed analyst narrative, where optimism around GenAI related deal flow and AI driven value pools is balanced against concerns that pressure on traditional services and higher AI investment needs could weigh on results if monetization takes longer to show up. As you read on, you will see how these shifting views can help...
